# Contributor License Agreement

Thank you for contributing to agent-manager ("the Project").

By signing this CLA you accept the following terms for all contributions you submit to the Project, now and in the future:

1. **Copyright license.** You grant Yoan Wai, the Project maintainer, a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, irrevocable license to use, reproduce, modify, distribute, publicly display, and sublicense your contributions, and to relicense them under other license terms, including commercial licenses.

2. **Patent license.** You grant the maintainer and all recipients of the Project a perpetual, worldwide, non-exclusive, royalty-free, irrevocable patent license to make, use, sell, and distribute your contributions alone or in combination with the Project.

3. **You keep your rights.** You retain full copyright ownership of your contributions and may use them for any other purpose. This agreement is a license, not a transfer of ownership.

4. **Your work.** You confirm each contribution is your own original work and that you are legally entitled to grant these licenses. If your employer has rights to your work, you confirm you have permission to contribute it.

5. **No warranty.** Contributions are provided as-is, and you are not required to provide support for them.

The Project itself remains available under its public license (AGPL-3.0). This agreement exists so the Project can stay sustainable, including the ability to offer it under additional license terms.

To sign, comment on your pull request:

> I have read the CLA Document and I hereby sign the CLA
